news.summary: The article discusses how AI tools like ChatGPT can aid both experienced and novice crypto investors in tracking portfolios efficiently. By defining specific requirements and combining ChatGPT with real-time crypto data from APIs like CoinMarketCap, investors can access valuable insights into their portfolio performance. Developing additional features like price alerts, performance analysis, and a user-friendly interface can enhance the functionality of a portfolio tracker. Steps for integrating ChatGPT with crypto data source, setting up requirements, and building a customized tracker are outlined, emphasizing the importance of testing and deploying the tracker for accuracy and reliability. AI integration can simplify portfolio tracking, but risks such as inaccurate predictions and data lag need to be considered. Happy AI-powered trading!
news.headline: Utilize ChatGPT for a personalized crypto tracker: define needs, set up ChatGPT, integrate data sources, combine AI with crypto data, and develop features for better market insights. Efficient portfolio management made easy with AI integration. Risk factors: AI inaccuracies, API delays, and decision biases. Proceed cautiously and best of luck with AI-driven trading!

news.summary: New regulations by the SEC prohibit unregulated foreign peer-to-peer cryptocurrency platforms. Offenders could potentially be sentenced to 3 years in prison and fined up to 300,000 baht.
news.headline: Thailand tightens regulations on foreign P2P crypto platforms, with offenders risking 3 years in jail and a 300,000 baht fine.

news.summary: Bitcoin's recent price drop is more than just a correction, signaling a significant decrease in capital inflows, liquidity, and investor sentiment. Analytics firm Glassnode's report highlighted the need for Bitcoin to reclaim $93,000 to regain bullish momentum, as the market downturn saw Bitcoin drop from $83,500 to $74,500, wiping out $150 billion in market cap. Ethereum's decline was even steeper, falling from $1,800 to $1,380, losing $40 billion in market cap. Capital inflows for Bitcoin have sharply decreased, with the network's 30-day realized cap change dropping from $100 billion to $6 billion per month. Ethereum is experiencing net capital outflows, losing around $6 billion per month. Global volatility, triggered by the U.S. administration's tariff announcements, has led to a broad selloff across digital assets.
news.headline: Bitcoin's bull market is reliant on reclaiming $93,000 per Glassnode, as global volatility triggered a selloff, shrinking the market cap by $150 billion for Bitcoin and $40 billion for Ethereum. Bitcoin's capital inflows dropped with realized cap change falling from $100 billion per month to $6 billion per month, while Ethereum sees net capital outflows losing $6 billion per month.

news.summary: This week, tokenized gold trading volume reached a two-year high, exceeding $1 billion as investors sought safe-haven assets amidst global uncertainty from US President Trump's import tariffs. The surge in trading volume marks the first time crossing $1 billion since March 2023, during a US banking crisis. Notable increases were seen in Paxos Gold (PAXG) trading by over 900%, Tether Gold (XAUT) by over 300%, and Kinesis Gold (KAU) by more than 83,000%. Tokenized gold market cap grew by over 21% and trading volume spiked by over 1,000% since Trump's inauguration. Gold prices hit a record high of over $3,100 per ounce on March 31. Tokenized gold is part of the burgeoning real-world asset tokenization sector, offering a diversification tool for investors amidst escalating market uncertainty. Gold's rise of over 18% in 2025 outpaced Bitcoin's decline of over 12% YTD. Geopolitical tensions due to tariffs spurred a flight to safety, with investors turning to stablecoins and tokenized assets.
news.headline: Tokenized gold volume surpasses $1B amid global uncertainties, marking a two-year high. Top assets see surges up to over 83,000%. Gold hits record $3,118 per ounce. Market cap and trading volume surge over 1,000%. Gold outperforms Bitcoin with an 18% increase. Flight to safety seen with stablecoins and tokenized assets amid geopolitical tensions. Fed launches Bank Term Funding Program post-crisis, fueling 2023 Bitcoin bull run.

news.summary: In New York City this week, rumors swirled that the infamous Gambino family is considering transitioning their criminal activities into legitimate enterprises. Speculation intensified as wooden crates bearing official branding started appearing on the streets, signaling a potential shift in their operations. The news caused a stir in the city as people discussed the implications of this move by the Gambino family, known for their history of illegal activities. This development marks a significant moment for the criminal organization, with many questioning the motives behind this sudden change. The exact details of their transition remain uncertain, but the buzz around this potential shift in strategy has captivated the public, reflecting the impact of this news on the community. As discussions continue, the future actions of the Gambino family will be closely watched by authorities and residents alike.
news.headline: Gambino family plans legit business operations in NYC, incorporating professionally branded materials.

news.summary: A new campaign by the Ad Council and Alzheimer's Association is focusing on raising awareness about early warning signs of Alzheimer's disease that may be mistaken for typical aging. This initiative specifically aims to reach out to Black Americans, who have double the likelihood of developing Alzheimer's. The campaign was launched on April 10, 2025, with the goal of educating the public about the early indicators of the disease and encouraging timely intervention.
news.headline: PSAs highlight Alzheimer's early signs, target Black Americans who are twice as likely to develop it.

news.summary: GHIBLI is a memecoin built on the Solana blockchain inspired by Studio Ghibli's visuals. Launched on March 25, 2025, it gained viral traction through social media, peaking at $0.03918 on March 28 before dropping to $0.0033 by April 7, leading to a market cap decline from $39.179 million to $3.37 million. It has a total supply of 1 billion tokens, with 999 million in circulation. Memecoins like GHIBLI use cultural references for hype rather than traditional utility. Other Ghibli memecoins, like GRIZLLER, GIGMA, and GLISA, failed to gain traction. Post-launch, GHIBLI witnessed a 40,000% value increase in 24 hours and attracted tech influencers like Elon Musk and Sam Altman. Binance Alpha and Gate.io listings further boosted its FOMO. The emotional appeal and community engagement contribute to its popularity. However, investors must consider volatility, legal issues, and ethical concerns related to Studio Ghibli's intellectual property. GHIBLI has been listed on exchanges like Gate.io and Kraken for spot trading, with considerations for security and volatility recommended for potential investors.
news.headline: GHIBLI memecoin, based on Solana, surged post-launch in March 2025, with a peak value of $0.03918. Market cap fell from $39.179M to $3.37M by April 7. It shows promise for meme sector despite the slump. Total token supply capped at 1B, with over 999M in circulation. Inspired by Studio Ghibli, its rise follows the popularity of anime-themed tokens. GHIBLI reflects the cultural trend of memecoins and gained traction after AI-generated Ghibli-style images went viral. Celebrity endorsements and listing on top exchanges contributed to its rise. Investors must consider volatility and copyright risks associated with memecoins like GHIBLI. Trading available on platforms like Gate.io and Kraken. Potential for rapid gains but caution advised due to market volatility and legal concerns.

news.summary: UK regulators are concerned about stablecoins and the broader crypto industry's impact on the financial system and monetary stability. During April meetings, regulators noted stablecoins and crypto markets have significantly expanded in the past year. They are developing frameworks to ensure financial resilience, focusing on liquidity, credit, and market risks of backing assets. Regulators worried about offshore stablecoins with inappropriate backing assets and the risks of currency substitution. There are concerns about stablecoin use for cross-border payments, especially in emerging markets like Sub-Saharan Africa. Developed economies have not shown similar trends, as they have better access to financial infrastructure. The European Securities and Markets Authority has also warned about crypto's impact on traditional financial markets' stability. The European Union's insurance authority proposed a rule for insurance firms to maintain capital equal to the value of their crypto holdings.
news.headline: UK regulators concerned about stablecoin risks as crypto market expands, with stablecoins now holding significant transaction volume in Africa. ESMA warns of crypto impacts on financial system stability. EU insurance authority introduces crypto holding rules for firms.

news.summary: Janover Inc (NASDAQ: JNVR) has recently acquired around $4.6 million worth of Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), as part of its new digital asset treasury strategy. The company plans to start staking its SOL holdings immediately to earn revenue and bolster the Solana network. This investment comes from the company's latest $42 million financing round. CEO Joseph Onorati expressed the company's goal of becoming a significant player in the digital asset space. You can find more details on this story at Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Janover acquires $4.6 million of Solana (SOL), starts digital asset treasury strategy, using funds from $42 million financing.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (trading as QNTM on NASDAQ, QNTM on CSE, and 0K91 on FRA) revealed a significant development. The company's licensee, Celly Nutrition Corporation, known for producing unbuzzd™ - a beverage that aids in alcohol metabolism, mental clarity, and alleviating hangover symptoms, has formed a strategic partnership with the Asian American Trade Associations Council (AATAC). The purpose of this collaboration is to increase the availability of unbuzzd™ in retail outlets, boost sales, and attract new consumers. The focus will be on unbuzzd™’s portable “On-the-Go Powder Stick Packs,” which have been scientifically validated to hasten the breakdown of alcohol in the blood and enhance cognitive alertness.
news.headline: Quantum BioPharma's licensee Celly Nutrition partners with AATAC to expand retail availability of unbuzzd™ alcohol detox beverage, targeting "On-the-Go Powder Stick Packs" to accelerate alcohol metabolism.

news.summary: In a recent six-month open-label study, patients with Type 2 diabetic nephropathy experienced significant advancements in kidney function and disease management. A noteworthy 71% of participants saw a reduction of over 30% in UP/Cr, a crucial marker for kidney damage. Similarly, 71% exhibited enhancements or stability in eGFR levels, indicating the preservation of kidney function.
news.headline: Positive Phase 2b data for melanocortin agonist in diabetic kidney disease to be presented, with 71% showing >30% reduction in UP/Cr and improved or stabilized eGFR in a six-month study.

news.summary: As per the company's announcement on 8 April 2025, Arbejdsmarkedets Tillægspension (ATP) has informed Copenhagen Airports A/S today that the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority has granted ATP a conditional exemption.
